title: Add adaptive agent bootstrap and call-shape linter
goal: Bind every fresh agent session to current runtime evidence and deterministically reject broad or ambiguous call shapes before execution, while keeping all adaptation proposal-only and preserving immutable safety gates.

acceptance.assertion: A read-only agent bootstrap capsule is derived from current friction and governor evidence, exposes drift handling and never authorizes execution.
A bounded read-only linter rejects multiple independent intents, multiple commands, oversized output and mutations without readback before execution.
Adaptive hints cannot change user intent, authorization, leases, secrets, recovery, kill switch, review, merge, deployment or privileged execution.
Invalid evidence integrity or an open circuit breaker disables adaptive hints instead of falling back to live routing.
Repository agent instructions require one intent, bounded reads, one mutation, post-state readback and no unchanged retries after operator stops.
Runtime contract, capability catalog, publication profiles and generated operator context publish both tools without drift.
Focused and full tests pass, the PR is reviewed and merged, and the deployed runtime is bound to the merge head.

metadata.source: User requested a self-learning adaptive entry layer after the T031 live proof on 2026-07-11.
metadata.verification_note: PR #160 added proposal-only grabowski_agent_bootstrap and deterministic grabowski_call_shape_check, updated AGENTS.md and synchronized all runtime/publication contracts. Full validation passed 1058 tests and both CI jobs. The merge head was deployed successfully.

validated_acceptance.release-evidence-bound-bootstrap: The capsule reads current friction and outcome-ledger summaries, emits stable evidence hashes and stays execution_authorized=false with automatic_live_routing_enabled=false.
validated_acceptance.deterministic-call-shape-linter: The linter deterministically flags multiple intents, command collections, oversized output, unisolated mutations and missing readback; tests prove stable hashes and split-before-execution behavior.
validated_acceptance.immutable-boundaries: The implementation enumerates and tests immutable user intent, authorization, secret, lease, recovery, kill-switch, review, merge, deployment and privileged-execution boundaries.
validated_acceptance.fail-closed-adaptation: Invalid governor integrity yields adaptive_mode=disabled_fail_closed; circuit-breaker candidates also disable adaptation.
validated_acceptance.agent-entry-instructions: AGENTS.md now directs fresh agents to bootstrap, lint broad calls, use one mutation and read back state before continuing.
validated_acceptance.contracts-and-publication: The canonical runtime contract and all publication projections contain 111 tools with no missing or orphan profiles.
validated_acceptance.tests-and-live-deployment: make validate passed 1058 tests; GitHub validate (3.10)/(3.12) passed; deployment completed on merge head 2cede6b4d5f9b73828ed7dfb44f24e1da5753f62.

runtime_snapshot.connector_snapshot_note: The current chat connector snapshot predates the deploy; runtime contract and deployment are current, but direct chat invocation requires a fresh connector snapshot.
